  1. Home
  2. Pickleball Update Center

Update Center

Pickleball Update Center

A curated source-based feed for pickleball news, PPA/UPA rule changes, paddle legality notes, and player news & trends. Tournament schedules, results, and rankings live in the Tournaments menu; paddle launch notes live inside the Paddles menu.

All updatesNewsRules & paddle legalityPlayer news & trends

Latest updates

NewsJun 19, 2026

PPA Tour official news source

Use the PPA Tour official site for tour announcements, live scoring links, event notes, and major competition updates. Picklary summarizes only short, source-linked notes in its own words.

PPAnewsofficial source

Check before acting: Read the original article or event page for full details.

Verify at source: PPA Tour official site
Rules & paddle legalityJun 19, 2026

Approved paddle legality source

The USA Pickleball approved paddle list is the priority source for tournament legality checks. Approval, decertification, and model-name details should be verified at the original equipment list.

paddle approvalrulesequipment

Check before acting: Search the exact paddle model and approval status before tournament play.

Verify at source: USA Pickleball Approved Paddle List
Rules & paddle legalityJun 19, 2026

UPA-A/PPA pro rulebook source

For pro-tour rules affecting PPA Tour and Major League Pickleball style competition, use the UPA-A rulebook page as an official reference and check the exact clause before summarizing.

UPA-APPA rulesMLP rules

Check before acting: Verify the clause number and the event context before acting.

Verify at source: UPA-A Official Rulebook
Player news & trendsJun 19, 2026

DUPR rankings source

DUPR rankings and ratings can change as results are added. Use the official DUPR ranking page for live numbers and treat player cards on Picklary as learning-oriented summaries.

DUPRrankingsratings

Check before acting: Check the official DUPR page for current player ratings.

Verify at source: DUPR rankings
Player news & trendsJun 19, 2026

Pro player news & roster source

For player movement, team rosters, returns, and injury news, use the official PPA and MLP player and team pages. Picklary summarizes only short, source-linked notes in its own words.

playersrosternews

Check before acting: Check the official player or team page for confirmed details.

Verify at source: PPA Tour players

Looking for tournament schedules, results, or rankings?

All tournament coverage lives in the Tournaments menu. The Update Center focuses on rule changes, player news, and non-tournament pickleball news.

Go to Tournaments →

Primary sources to verify

Reference source

PPA Tour official site

Checks: news · match results · live scoring · brackets

Source
Reference source

USA Pickleball official rules

Checks: official rulebook changes · rule interpretations · rule PDFs

Source
Reference source

USA Pickleball approved paddle list

Checks: approved paddle list · decertified paddles · newly added paddles · tournament legality

Source
Reference source

UPA-A official rulebook

Checks: pro tour rules · PPA/MLP rule changes · equipment standards · scoring rules

Source
Picklary

An independent, reader-focused pickleball information site.
